Layout.name: FAT Title

LayoutObject.name: Breadcrumb

Calculation.Text: "View all media with subtitles in title"
"View all text styles defined in title"

SetProperty ( "fat_title_id" ; FAT Title::PrimaryKey ) & SetProperty ( "funkis_cloud_title_id" ; FAT Title::Funkis Cloud Title id ) & SetProperty ( "title_environment" ; FAT Title::Title Environment )
FAT Title::Title isLive Or FAT Title::Title Backend ≠ "Funkis Cloud"
Not FAT Title::Title isLive Or FAT Title::Title Backend ≠ "Funkis Cloud"

Title.Text: "The images shows how the content is organised in FAT"

Calculation.Text: isEditor Or isTranslator Or FAT Title::Title Levels = "Page" Or FAT Title::Base project ≠ ""
"Type a description of this Title here"
"Type a description of this Title here"
isEditor Or isTranslator Or FAT Title::<Field Missing> = "slide" Or FAT Title::Base project ≠ ""

LayoutObject.name: TAG Portal

StyledText.Data: Title total - Packages: <<Number of packages>> Chapters: <<Number of chapters>> Pages: <<Number of pages>> Page items: <<Number of page items>>

Calculation.Text: FAT Package::Package Group = FAT Title::gView Package group Title Or FAT Title::gView Package group Title = "" /*FAT Package::Package Group = User X Title @ Title::View Package group Title or User X Title @ Title::View Package group Title = ""*/
SetProperty ( "numberOfChildrenField"; GetFieldName ( FAT Title::Number of packages )) & SetProperty ( "sortField"; GetFieldName ( FAT Package::SortIndex )) & SetProperty ( "action"; "up")
SetProperty ( "numberOfChildrenField"; GetFieldName ( FAT Title::Number of packages )) & SetProperty ( "sortField"; GetFieldName ( FAT Package::SortIndex )) & SetProperty ( "action"; "down")
isTranslator Or isEditor Or FAT Package::Proxy type = "Chapter" Or FAT Package::Proxy type = "Page"
isTranslator Or isEditor Or FAT Package::Proxy type ≠ "chapter"
isTranslator Or isEditor Or FAT Package::Proxy type ≠ "page"
isTranslator Or isEditor Or FAT Package::Proxy type = "Chapter" Or FAT Package::Proxy type = "Page"
isTranslator Or isEditor Or FAT Package::Proxy type ≠ "chapter"
isTranslator Or isEditor Or FAT Package::Proxy type ≠ "page"
Case ( IsEmpty ( FAT Package::Description ) ; "No description found for this package." ; FAT Package::Description)
Case ( IsEmpty ( FAT Package::Description ) ; "No description found for this package." ; FAT Package::Description)
Case ( IsEmpty ( FAT Package::Description ) ; "No description found for this package." ; FAT Package::Description)
Case ( IsEmpty ( FAT Package::Description ) ; "No description found for this package." ; FAT Package::Description)
Case ( IsEmpty ( FAT Package::Description ) ; "No description found for this package." ; FAT Package::Description)
Case ( IsEmpty ( FAT Package::Description ) ; "No description found for this package." ; FAT Package::Description)
Case ( IsEmpty ( FAT Package::Description ) ; "No description found for this package." ; FAT Package::Description)
Case ( IsEmpty ( FAT Package::Description ) ; "No description found for this package." ; FAT Package::Description)
Case ( IsEmpty ( FAT Package::Description ) ; "No description found for this package." ; FAT Package::Description)

SetProperty ( "item_type" ; Case (FAT Package::Proxy type = ""; "Course"; FAT Package::Proxy type )) & SetProperty ( "item_id" ; Case ( FAT Package::Proxy type = "" ; FAT Package::PrimaryKey ; FAT Package::Proxy type = "chapter" ; FAT Chapter::PrimaryKey ; FAT Package::Proxy type = "page"; FAT Page::PrimaryKey) ) & SetProperty ( "item_parent_id" ; Case ( FAT Package::Proxy type = "" ; FAT Package::Parent id ; FAT Package::Proxy type = "chapter" ; FAT Chapter::Parent id ; FAT Package::Proxy type = "page" ; FAT Page::Parent id) ) & SetProperty ( "item_level" ; 1 )
FAT Package::Proxy type = "" Or isEditor Or isTranslator
IsEmpty ( Title Environment::Publish Server id ) Or FAT Package::Package type name = "Title info" Or FAT Package::Package Backend = "lms"
"Copy a link to package on publish"
IsEmpty ( Title Environment::Publish Server id ) Or FAT Package::Package type name = "Title info" Or FAT Title::Title Backend ≠ "Funkis Cloud"

LayoutObject.name: Gray button

Calculation.Text: "Publish package - last publish: " & FAT Package::Last Publish Timestamp
IsEmpty ( Title Environment::Publish Server id ) Or FAT Package::Last Publish Timestamp > FAT Package::Last Export Timestamp Or FAT Title::Title Backend ≠ "Funkis Cloud"

SetProperty ( "level" ; 1 ) & SetProperty ( "caller" ; "Title" ) & SetProperty ( "server_mode" ; "Preview" ) & SetProperty ( "package_dir" ; FAT Package::Export Package Sub Path ) & SetProperty ( "package_friendly_id" ; FAT Package::JSON Friendly id ) & SetProperty ( "package_type_name" ; FAT Package::Package type name ) & SetProperty ( "fat_version" ; FAT Package::FAT version number )
"Copy a link to package on preview"
"Export package to preview - last export: " & FAT Package::Last Export Timestamp
SetProperty ( "publish_mode" ; "DELIVERY" ) & SetProperty ( "caller" ; "Package") & SetProperty ( "package_id" ; FAT Package::PrimaryKey) & SetProperty ( "show_dialog" ; "true")
IsEmpty ( FAT Package::Delivery format ) Or isTranslator Or FAT Title::Title Backend = "Funkis Cloud"

LayoutObject.name: Page info 2
Chapter info 2
Package info 2
Page info 2
Chapter info 2
Package info 2
Content overview

Calculation.Text: FAT Overview::Hierarchy Level ≤ FAT Title::gView hierarchy level Title And (FAT Overview::Package group = FAT Title::gView Package group Title Or FAT Title::gView Package group Title = "") /*FAT Overview::Hierarchy Level ≤ User X Title @ Title::View hierarchy level Title and (FAT Overview::Package group = User X Title @ Title::View Package group Title or User X Title @ Title::View Package group Title = "")*/

LayoutObject.name: Page info

Calculation.Text: FAT Overview::Item type ≠ "Page" Or FAT Overview::Hierarchy Level ≠ 2

LayoutObject.name: Chapter info
Package info
Page item info Copy

Calculation.Text: Not IsEmpty (FAT Page item @ Overview::Media 1) Or Not IsEmpty (FAT Page item @ Overview::Media 2)
IsEmpty (FAT Page item @ Overview::Media 1) And IsEmpty (FAT Page item @ Overview::Media 2)
FAT Overview::Item type ≠ "Page item" Or FAT Overview::Hierarchy Level ≠ 3

LayoutObject.name: Page info Copy

Calculation.Text: FAT Overview::Item type ≠ "Page" Or FAT Overview::Hierarchy Level ≠ 3

LayoutObject.name: Page item info Copy2

Calculation.Text: Not IsEmpty (FAT Page item @ Overview::Media 1) Or Not IsEmpty (FAT Page item @ Overview::Media 2)
IsEmpty (FAT Page item @ Overview::Media 1) And IsEmpty (FAT Page item @ Overview::Media 2)
FAT Overview::Item type ≠ "Page item" Or FAT Overview::Hierarchy Level ≠ 4

LayoutObject.name: Page info

Calculation.Text: FAT Overview::Item type ≠ "Page" Or FAT Overview::Hierarchy Level ≠ 2

LayoutObject.name: Chapter info
Package info
Page info

Calculation.Text: FAT Overview::Item type ≠ "Page" Or FAT Overview::Hierarchy Level ≠ 2

LayoutObject.name: Chapter info
Package info
Page item info Copy

Calculation.Text: Not IsEmpty (FAT Page item @ Overview::Media 1) Or Not IsEmpty (FAT Page item @ Overview::Media 2)
IsEmpty (FAT Page item @ Overview::Media 1) And IsEmpty (FAT Page item @ Overview::Media 2)
FAT Overview::Item type ≠ "Page item" Or FAT Overview::Hierarchy Level ≠ 3

LayoutObject.name: Page info Copy

Calculation.Text: FAT Overview::Item type ≠ "Page" Or FAT Overview::Hierarchy Level ≠ 3

LayoutObject.name: Page item info Copy

Calculation.Text: Not IsEmpty (FAT Page item @ Overview::Media 1) Or Not IsEmpty (FAT Page item @ Overview::Media 2)
IsEmpty (FAT Page item @ Overview::Media 1) And IsEmpty (FAT Page item @ Overview::Media 2)
FAT Overview::Item type ≠ "Page item" Or FAT Overview::Hierarchy Level ≠ 3

LayoutObject.name: Page info Copy

Calculation.Text: FAT Overview::Item type ≠ "Page" Or FAT Overview::Hierarchy Level ≠ 3

LayoutObject.name: Page item info Copy2

Calculation.Text: Not IsEmpty (FAT Page item @ Overview::Media 1) Or Not IsEmpty (FAT Page item @ Overview::Media 2)
IsEmpty (FAT Page item @ Overview::Media 1) And IsEmpty (FAT Page item @ Overview::Media 2)
FAT Overview::Item type ≠ "Page item" Or FAT Overview::Hierarchy Level ≠ 4

LayoutObject.name: Page item info Copy2

Calculation.Text: Not IsEmpty (FAT Page item @ Overview::Media 1) Or Not IsEmpty (FAT Page item @ Overview::Media 2)
IsEmpty (FAT Page item @ Overview::Media 1) And IsEmpty (FAT Page item @ Overview::Media 2)
FAT Overview::Item type ≠ "Page item" Or FAT Overview::Hierarchy Level ≠ 4

Title.Text: "The image shows how the content is organised in the FAT and which levels are available for each package type."

StyledText.Data: Enter a session key for if you want to test in a specific session. Leave blank to select a session on Funkis Cloud.

Calculation.Text: IsEmpty ( User X Title @ Title::PrimaryKey ) Or FAT Title::Title Backend ≠ "Funkis Cloud"

StyledText.Data: If True = 1, user progress and data entered by the user in IO input blocks will not be saved. This affects only local data. For Titles using Funkis Cloud, data will not be affected.

Calculation.Text: IsEmpty ( User X Title @ Title::PrimaryKey ) Or FAT Title::Title Backend = "Funkis Cloud"

StyledText.Data: Set chapters as complete in preview
If True = 1, the chapters will be marked completed when testing the program. When a chapter is marked completed it will unlock the chapters.
If True (default) the red Inspector tag to the left of the screen will be visible on all published apps in the program.
This title is not added to your user.

Calculation.Text: Not IsEmpty ( User X Title @ Title::PrimaryKey )
"Deliver all packages to Funkis Cloud production server"
FAT Title::Title Backend ≠ "Funkis Cloud" Or IsEmpty(Title Environment::Publish Server id) Or isTranslator
Count ( FAT Package Group::PrimaryKey ) > 0 And Not IsEmpty ( FAT Title::gView Package group Title )
"Export all content in all packages to Preview"
IsEmpty(Title Environment::Preview Server id) Or isTranslator

StyledText.Data: Export and Publish packages in group

Calculation.Text: Count ( FAT Package Group::PrimaryKey ) = 0 Or IsEmpty ( FAT Title::gView Package group Title )

StyledText.Data: If True it will be possible to add and edit comments to the review list for each page item in the Title.

The Root path is individual for each FAT user. It decides where the content of this Title will be exported. However, each Package will export to its own package folder or directory. The Package directory is identical for both remote and local export and cannot be changed

Calculation.Text: IsEmpty (User X Title @ Title::Title Filepath export)
IsEmpty ( User X Title @ Title::PrimaryKey ) Or notDeveloper
"Export all texts to a Word document (HTML)"
Not IsEmpty ( FAT Localisation::Shared text localisation id )
